description: End of a document about pledges (rahāʾin) signed by Moshe b. Binyamin ha-Sefaradi and Berakhot b. Shela ha-Kohen. The validation (qiyyum) is signed by Elʿazar b. Yosef and Yeshuʿa b. Yoshiyya the descendant of Shemaʿyahu Gaʾon and Natan b. Shemuel, who also wrote the document (he was active ca. 1128–1164 CE). Dating: ca. 1140 CE. (Information from Goitein's index card and Mediterranean Society, II, p. 584)
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
